title: P'w'itthki
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''P'w'itthki''' was one of the highest deities of the [[Ssi-ruuvi religion]]. According to the [[Ssi-ruu]]vi holy book, the ''[[G'nnoch]]'', P'w'itthki and [[Ssi]] hatched from the primordial first egg, while P'w'itthki's offspring hatched from the third egg.

Ssi and P'w'itthki eventually fought, with Ssi winning. Ssi allowed P'w'itthki's offspring to live, on the condition that they serve Ssi's offspring for all eternity. Thus came into being the Ssi-ruu ([[Ssi]]'s offspring) and their slave race, the [[P'w'eck]]s (P'w'itthki's offspring).

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-02-XX -->''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''
